---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Minimal command or code that reproduces the issue
mcpforge generate "..."
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error output or tracebacks.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.12.3 -->
- mcpforge version: <!-- e.g. 0.2.0 — run `mcpforge --version` -->
- uv version: <!-- run `uv --version` -->

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or generated files that might help diagnose the issue.
